prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **Nissan MR20DDT** (2.0L turbo inline-4, 300hp) with a **Garrett GTX3582R** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegate to handle 1.5 bar of boost, targeting 450whp on **Motul 300V 5W-40** race oil and a **PWR radiator** with dual **SPAL 12" fans** for thermal management.

Drivetrain: Install a **Quaife ATB LSD** (2.5-way) in the **Renault Sport 6-speed TL8 transaxle** with **PPG straight-cut gears (1.5:1 ratio)** and a **Tilton 7.25" twin-disc clutch** with **Forgestar F14 18x10.5" wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (275/35/18)** for optimized power delivery and grip.

Suspension/Chassis: Swap the OEM **Trophy-R Öhlins TTX40 dampers** for **Öhlins Road & Track DFV (Dual Flow Valve) coilovers** with **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs**, reinforced with **SuperPro polybushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear toe links)** and a **Whiteline 24mm adjustable rear sway bar** to eliminate body roll and improve Nürburgring lap times.
estetica: Aero: Replace the stock **Megane Trophy-R carbon fiber front splitter** with a **Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit** (custom-fitted for the Trophy-R’s 1,958mm width) paired with a **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (2,000mm span, 300mm chord)** and **AeroCatch carbon hood latches** for aggressive downforce and track-ready durability.

Exterior: Apply a **3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap** with **Rally Armor UR mudflaps (custom-cut for Trophy-R wheel arches)** and **OEM Renault Sport decals (removed and reapplied in matte anthracite)**. Replace the stock **LED DRLs** with **Lux H8 Angel Eyes (6000K, 35W)** and add **Depo Racing JDM-style side markers** for a stealth-aggressive look.

Interior: Install **Sparco Pro 2000 seats (carbon fiber shells, FIA 8862-2009 certified)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)** on a **NRG quick-release hub**, and a **Motec C127 dash logger** replacing the OEM cluster. Sound deadening is removed, and the **OMP aluminum pedal set** is added for weight reduction and driver feedback.
